doraemon.title: Doraemon Classroom Decibel Monitor
doraemon.pleaseAllowMic: Please select "Allow" for microphone after clicking
doraemon.helpAdviceMuteDesc: : 40-50 dB is normal; if over 65dB, lower sensitivity.
doraemon.helpAdviceReadDesc: : 70-75 dB is ideal; if hard to reach 70dB, raise sensitivity.
doraemon.thresholdHelpDesc: : 60-65 dB usually works well. Raise it when background HVAC noise is strong; lower it only if the classroom really needs near-silence.

license.confirmClear: Are you sure to clear local license cache?
license.title: 🤫 Decibel Monitor
license.subtitle: Please enter your purchased license code

errors.locationRestrictedDesc:
Sorry, this feature is not available in your current region.

💡 Suggestions:
• Use a VPN to connect from a supported region
• Or explore other apps in the studio!
errors.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio features. Please upgrade your browser.
errors.micDisconnected:
⚠️ Microphone connection disconnected!
Monitoring stopped. Please click start again.
errors.permissionDenied:
⛔ You clicked "Deny" for microphone.

✅ Solution:
1. Click the "lock" or "settings" icon on the left side of the browser address bar.
2. Find "Microphone" and click "Reset" or "Allow".
3. Refresh the page or click the button below to retry.
errors.noMicFound: 🔌 No microphone device detected. Please check connection.

micTest.title: Mic Test
micTest.windowHint: Popup diagnosis without taking over the main screen
micTest.guide: Capture a quiet sample first, then capture a noisy sample.
micTest.stageQuietDesc: Keep the room quiet, wait for the live value to settle, then tap "Capture Quiet dB".
micTest.stageActiveDesc: Make normal classroom noise, wait for the value to settle, then tap "Capture Noise".

healthDesc.good: This device can separate quiet time from student noise and should work for study hall monitoring.
healthDesc.flat: The level barely changes even when the room gets noisy. This usually means the all-in-one PC is heavily flattening the mic signal.
healthDesc.noisy: Baseline room noise is already high, so false alarms are more likely unless sensitivity is lowered or the threshold is raised.
healthDesc.weak: The microphone reacts, but the dynamic range is small. Raising sensitivity slightly should help.

report.title: Weekly Class Report
report.subtitle: Monday to Friday · Open in a dialog
report.localOnly: Saved on this computer only. Nothing is uploaded.
report.empty: No saved sessions for this day yet.

warningResetPassword.manageDescEmpty: Add a lock to the warning reset button so students cannot clear it while the teacher is away.
warningResetPassword.manageDescSet: Protection is on. Clearing warnings, updating the password, or removing the password now requires the current password first.
warningResetPassword.verifyDesc: Enter the teacher password before the warning count can be cleared.
warningResetPassword.helpDesc: This password only protects the warning reset button. It helps prevent students from clearing warnings and does not affect monitoring, thresholds, or mute controls.
warningResetPassword.clearDesc: Enter the current password before removing protection so students cannot simply turn it off.

broadcast.teacherDesc: Launch professional broadcasts with real-time feedback and state monitoring.
broadcast.classroomDesc: Immersive display with zero-latency audio sync and fullscreen experience.
broadcast.licenseSubtitle: Enter your license code to release the magic.
broadcast.enterpriseSecurityDesc: Multi-tenant isolation powered by license key hashing and end-to-end channel segregation.
broadcast.globalProximityDesc: Seamlessly operating through Vercel Global Edge Network with zero-config accessibility in China.
broadcast.audioSynthesisDesc: Smart text-to-speech engine with emergency bypass and repetitive broadcast logic.

sender.broadcastPlaceholder: What do you want to broadcast today?
sender.clearAllRoomsConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear ALL associated rooms in the cloud database? This action cannot be undone.
sender.copyPasteInstruction: Select the three columns in Excel, press Ctrl+C to copy, and use Ctrl+V to paste into the box below.
sender.scheduleHelper: Paste tabular data exported from Excel. Ensure each line contains: Date, Time, Content (separated by tabs).
sender.parseFailedExcel: Could not identify valid data. Please ensure format is Date(Tab)Time(Tab)Content.
sender.parseFailedWord: Could not extract tasks from document. Please ensure it is a standard Word table.
sender.parseError: Failed to parse Word document, please try again.
sender.importSuccess: Successfully imported {count} tasks! System is now monitoring.
sender.clearScheduleConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all scheduled tasks?
sender.verifyDesc: Parsed {count} tasks. You can edit or delete them before final import.
sender.formatPrompt: Format: Date - Time - Content (Supports copy-paste from Excel)
sender.inputPlaceholder: Enter what you want to broadcast...

receiver.joinDesc: Enter the persistent channel ID assigned by your instructor to begin syncing.
